name: Tafl PTK
short_description: Based on the Viking game Tafl, build your squad and grab up to 3 more friends to survive an onslaught of raiding monsters as you try to get your king to an escaping ship in one piece. Between levels: pick new abilities, squad members with traits synergy and setup your formation to protect your king.
detailed_description: Tafl PTK (Protect the King) is a squad formation auto battler where you play an escaping king. Just like in the classic Viking game Tafl you will be escaping to the corners to win. However, you will be facing waves of enemies as they spawn into the map. The brave squad that you have put together will try their best to stay in the formation specified as they bare the brunt of hordes of enemies and random events. Controllers will be needed for co-op.
